name: Creole Daube Glace'
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice olives and arrange in the bottom of a 6-cup mold.
2. Carefully sprinkle beef over olives.
3. In a large bowl, mix gelatin with 1/2 cup of the beef broth.
4. Heat the remaining broth to boiling; add it to the gelatin mixture and stir until the gelatin is completely dissolved.
5. Add the remaining ingredients; mix well.
6. Chill just until the mixture reaches the consistency of beaten egg whites, then pour over olives and meat in the mold.
7. Chill until firm; unmold to serve.
